sourceMovie.title: Basic Instinct
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Basic Instinct works as a thriller movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The thriller and mystery blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Zodiac
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Basic Instinct clicked for you, Zodiac (2007) is a strong next stop: both trade in thriller and mystery, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Basic Instinct?
faq.answer: Try Zodiac, Chinatown, Blue Velvet—each shares DNA with Basic Instinct while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Basic Instinct?
faq.answer: Basic Instinct (1992) is best described as Thriller, Mystery. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Basic Instinct part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Basic Instinct Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
